name: typescript-setup
description: Add strict no-emit TypeScript checking for npm projects.

optionalSteps.name: css-import-types
optionalSteps.when: The target repo imports .css files from TypeScript and lacks a stylesheet module declaration.
optionalSteps.prompt: This repo imports CSS from TypeScript. Do you want me to add a small CSS module declaration as part of the TypeScript setup?

docs: Document npm run typecheck as the local TypeScript verification command.
Document any target-project changes to source globs, libraries, module resolution, or ambient declarations.
notes: Adapt include globs before applying to repos with a different source directory.
Keep framework-generated TypeScript config intact unless the user approves replacing it.
Drop DOM or Node library assumptions only when the target runtime does not need them.
